texto: Yes, I'm a patriotic person. For these people who disgrace the American way and burn our flag and do all of these things... I say, don't live here and disgrace my country. Go live in the Middle East and see how you like it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Payne Stewart: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Yes, I'm a patriotic person. For these people who disgrace the American way and burn our flag and…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, american, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e live.

frase_original: Yes, I'm a patriotic person. For these people who disgrace the American way and burn our flag and do all of these things... I say, don't live here and disgrace my country. Go live in the Middle East and see how you like it.
